articles.title: Plasm Network Raises $2.4 Million via Binance Labs
articles.description: Spurred by an increase in Decentralized Finance (DeFi) usage, increased transactions and higher fees are clogging up the Ethereum (ETH) network. This has led to a recent rise in prices and interest in alternative smart contract platforms or adaptive solutions, with Polkadot and Plasm being one of the biggest. Projects are building on new platforms claiming … Continued

articles.title: Matic Rebrands as Polygon to Take on Polkadot Network
articles.description: Part of Matic’s rebranding to Polygon will also see the project working on a system similar to Polkadot on Ethereum, using multichain architecture for scaling. Matic Rebrands to Tackle Polkadot Polygon uses Layer-2 secured changes and sidechains in its scaling solution for Ethereum.
